seeds.class: C14 — the descoped continuum Lorentzian-propinquity convergence (Lorentzian spectral triple on S^3 x R) flipped from 'remains open' to 'is now established'. It is OPEN/descoped; presenting it as established is the zombie class.

C2 — the four-witness BW period-closure bit-exact assertion 'assert pr["max_residual"] < 1e-12' gutted to '< 1e12' (vacuous; any residual passes, defeats the period-closure check). Backs Paper 42's four-witness/period-2pi claim.

C9 — Paper 53 status flipped from 'the finite disk is obstructed by its Dirichlet boundary and convergence is recovered only on the boundaryless plane' to 'convergence is recovered on the finite disk' (re-asserts the WITHDRAWN finite-disk convergence; the genuine carrier is the boundaryless plane).

p44 BBB Krein operator-system construction (axioms, bit-exact Riemannian limit, envelope-dependent propagation number) — genuine; Lorentzian-metric descoped correctly.

p53 boundaryless-plane Bochner-Riesz convergence (the genuine carrier, Lambda^{-0.6..-0.9}, positivity s>=1/2); the finite disk is OBSTRUCTED (thm:interior (b),(c) withdrawn) — correct, must NOT be re-flagged.
